The '''ISB operations ship''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] outfitted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for use by the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. It was capable of landing on a [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface to carry out its operations.

{{Ship-stub}}
